problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
